popularStory.headline: Life
popularStory.description:
From Wikipedia: 


Donnchadh was the son of Morggán and Agnes. Donnchadh benefited from the introduction of feudal primogeniture as a custom, as it enabled him and his kin to exclude the descendants o …

zh.Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當Donnchadh Earl of Mar於1165年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪時，他的父親Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar50歲，母親Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar33歲。他於大約1207年與Orabella Latherisk在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1244年在蘇格蘭Forfarshire倫迪享年79歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪笛卡爾 阿爾迪聖 馬查阿也斯 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Donnchadh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

variants.name: Duncan
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

en.lifeSummary: When Donnchadh Earl of Mar was born in 1165, in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar, was 50 and his mother, Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar, was 33. He married Orabella Latherisk about 1207, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1244, in Lundie, Forfarshire, Scotland, at the age of 79, and was buried in Saint Machar's Cathedral, Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donnchadh Earl of Mar est né en 1165, à Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Orabella Latherisk environ 1207, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1244, à Lundie, Forfarshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Saint Machar's Cathedral, Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Donnchadh Earl of Mar 1165 in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar 50 und seine Mutter Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar 33. Er hat um 1207 in Schottland, United Kingdom Orabella Latherisk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1244 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Lundie, Forfarshire, Scotland und wurde in Saint Machar's Cathedral, Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Donnchadh Earl of Mar è nato il nel 1165 nel Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Orabella Latherisk circa 1207, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1244, nel Lundie, Forfarshire, Scotland, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint Machar's Cathedral, Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Donnchadh Earl of Marが1165年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアアバーディーンで生まれた時，父Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Marは50歳，母Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Marは33歳であった。約1207年にイギリススコットランドでOrabella Latheriskと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1244年にスコットランドForfarshireルンディで79歳で死去し，スコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアアバーディーンオルド アバーディーンサイント マチャー'ス カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Donnchadh Earl of Mar(이)가 1165년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 압르디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1207년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Orabella Latherisk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1244년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 런디에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 압르디실르 압르디 드 압르디 세인트 맥하'스 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Donnchadh Earl of Mar nasceu em 1165, em Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Orabella Latherisk aproximadamente 1207, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1244, em Lundie, Forfarshire, Scotland, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint Machar's Cathedral, Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ru.Saint Machar's Cathedral, Old Aberdeen,: сеинт мачар'с кэтедраль, олд абирдин, абирдин, абирдиншир, Шотландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donnchadh Earl of Mar родился в 1165 г. в местности абирдин, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Orabella Latherisk около 1207 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1244 г. в местности лунди, Forfarshire, Шотландия в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт мачар'с кэтедраль, олд абирдин, абирдин, абирдиншир, Шотландия.
